item.title: Unified config files 摘要
item.description:
The author describes strategies for maintaining a consistent work environment across different computers and operating systems. Key approaches include remapping keys so that key functionality (e.g., copy, paste) is consistent regardless of OS, using a shared `.bash_aliases` file sourced by OS-specific `.bashrc` files, and employing branching logic in config files based on hostname or OS type (e.g., in Emacs `init.el`). The post emphasizes the long-term benefits of unified configs over ad hoc edits, which can lead to drift.
标签: productivity, dotfiles, configuration management, cross-platform, bash, emacs, key remapping, workflow, devops, linux

item.title: New Logic for Programmers (and the future of this newsletter) 摘要
item.description:
Hillel Wayne announces version 0.14 of 'Logic for Programmers' with layout and editing improvements, aiming for print copies by end of June. He also reveals he will join Antithesis as a developer educator starting August, focusing on making property-based testing and fuzzing accessible. The newsletter will shift away from formal methods toward history and software oddities, and may reduce frequency from weekly to biweekly or monthly. The post concludes with a mathematical observation about monotonicity of 'all' and 'some' quantifiers and temporal logic operators.
标签: logic, programming, book, testing, property-based testing, fuzzing, newsletter, formal methods, temporal logic, career

item.title: Luca Maestri Runs the Cafeteria 摘要
item.description:
Apple announced in August 2024 that CFO Luca Maestri would transition from his role on January 1, 2025, with Kevan Parekh succeeding him. Maestri continues as vice president of Corporate Services, overseeing information systems, security, real estate, development, Caffè Macs, and Claris. The article notes the charm of Maestri's oversight of Caffè Macs and interest in Claris.
标签: Apple, executive transition, CFO, Luca Maestri, Kevan Parekh, corporate services, Caffè Macs, Claris, leadership

item.title: Claris CEO Ryan McCann on FileMaker in the Age of Agentic Coding 摘要
item.description:
John Gruber comments on Claris CEO Ryan McCann's blog post about FileMaker's role in the age of AI-generated applications. McCann argues that AI-generated apps face problems of deployment, security, and management, which FileMaker has solved for over 40 years with its unified platform supporting Mac, Windows, iPad, iPhone, and web. Gruber notes the omission of Android. FileMaker 2026 will focus on resiliency, productivity, and infrastructure, including disaster recovery and agentic coding previews later in summer. Gruber admits he rarely hears about FileMaker but acknowledges it remains a significant business.
标签: FileMaker, Claris, Ryan McCann, AI-generated applications, cross-platform, agentic coding, disaster recovery, Android omission, John Gruber, Daring Fireball

item.title: Triangular analog of the squircle 摘要
item.description:
The article explores a mathematical generalization of the squircle concept to triangles. Inspired by a comment on a guitar pick post, the author defines a function using a Lebesgue norm with three linear functions representing triangle sides. The level set of this function approximates a triangle with rounded corners, where the parameter p controls the sharpness: larger p yields a shape closer to a perfect triangle. This provides a smooth, continuously curved analog of a triangle, similar to how a squircle relates to a square.
标签: mathematics, geometry, squircle, triangle, Lebesgue norm, curvature, level set, rounded corners, analog, John D. Cook

item.title: Broadcast Booths Around Baseball Tip Their Caps to John Sterling 摘要
item.description:
John Sterling, the legendary Yankees radio broadcaster, was honored across MLB after his passing. Teams paid tribute during games, with Yankees announcer Michael Kay mimicking Sterling's iconic home run call for Aaron Judge. The Yankees will wear a commemorative patch for the season and played Sterling's post-win call at the stadium. Sterling called 5,426 regular-season and 225 postseason Yankees games, including a streak of 5,060 consecutive games from 1989 to 2019. He called nearly 3% of all MLB games ever played, a testament to his remarkable longevity and distinctive style.
标签: MLB, Yankees, John Sterling, broadcasting, tribute, baseball, sports, legacy, radio, announcer

item.title: SQLAlchemy 2 In Practice - Chapter 7: Asynchronous SQLAlchemy 摘要
item.description:
This chapter from the SQLAlchemy 2 in Practice book introduces asynchronous programming support in SQLAlchemy 1.4+ using the asyncio package. It covers both Core and ORM modules, enabling developers to use SQLAlchemy in modern async applications like FastAPI. The chapter explains how to set up async engines, sessions, and queries, leveraging Python's async/await syntax for non-blocking database operations.
标签: SQLAlchemy, asyncio, async programming, Python, ORM, database, FastAPI, web development, tutorial
